plans.title: Frontend Diagram Viewer
plans.description: Expose MCP-rendered SVG diagrams through the bridge read model and render them in the Codex Mobile Diagrams section.

tasks.title: T033 Extend SDD diagram read model for rendered SVG artifacts
tasks.description: Include MCP-rendered SVG artifacts in the SDD diagram read model while preserving Mermaid support.

tasks.title: T034 Add diagram artifact metadata contract
tasks.description: Define metadata required to classify generated SVG diagrams and connect them to source DiagramSpec artifacts.

tasks.title: T035 Add Diagrams section gallery for rendered artifacts
tasks.description: Add a frontend gallery/list surface for Mermaid and MCP-rendered SVG diagrams.

tasks.title: T036 Render SVG diagrams in Flutter with viewport controls
tasks.description: Render self-contained SVG diagrams with pan, zoom, reset, and controlled error handling.

tasks.title: T037 Preserve semantic SVG IDs for feedback and future edits
tasks.description: Preserve diagram path and semantic SVG element metadata for feedback and future edit operations.

plans.title: MCP Diagram Workflow And Mobile Release
plans.description: Connect frontend diagram actions to the local Diagram MCP server, persist exports, test the flow, and ship the mobile release.

tasks.title: T038 Wire frontend runs to the Diagram MCP server
tasks.description: Allow diagram generation and update runs to select the local Diagram MCP server from frontend options.

tasks.title: T039 Persist MCP exports into spec diagram folders
tasks.description: Save generated SVG artifacts and metadata into stable spec diagram paths.

tasks.title: T040 Add backend and Flutter tests for diagram viewing
tasks.description: Cover SVG discovery, gallery rendering, detail rendering, and malformed content handling.

tasks.title: T041 Prepare and publish frontend release
tasks.description: Bump and publish the mobile app through the real-backend Android release workflow after implementation.
